---
title: Logic
description: Propositions, truth values, and implication.
---

::: {.learning-objectives}
### Learning Objectives

- Work with true/false propositions.
- Interpret logical implication.
- Generate simple truth tables.
:::

```{python}
from edumath.discrete_math.logic import implies, truth_table

truth_table(("p", "q"), implies)
```

::: {.practice-box}
1. When is `p -> q` false?
2. What does a truth table show?
3. Why is logic useful for proofs and programming?
:::
